word: H5068 - נָדַב - nâdab - naw-dab' - Offer freely

sections.paragraph:
Original: נדב

Transliteration: nâdab

Phonetic: naw-dab'

BDB Definition:

  1. to incite, impel, make willing
    1. (Qal) to incite, impel
    2. (Hithpael)
      1. to volunteer
      2. to offer free-will offerings

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1299

Part(s) of speech: Verb
